variants.title: HiFi Filter SI 42001 Air/Oil Separator | Replaces the SF Filter SAO55770
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter SI 42001 Air/Oil Separator is HiFi's replacement to the SF Filter SAO55770. Easy to install and replace, the SI 42001 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Donaldson P783510 Air Oil Separator | Replaces the SF Filter SAO55770
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P783510 Air Oil Separator is designed to separate oil from compressed air systems, reducing oil carryover and improving air quality. It enhances system efficiency and protects downstream equipment. Built with durable materials, this separator ensures reliable operation in industrial and automotive applications.
